title: RenderDistance+
description:
This Plugin Makes it where any user can change there in game render distance on the fly with a command


Usage: 
/renderdistance <number>
it will set your "internal render distance" to said number and said the simulation distance to half of it
body: This plugin gives players the ability to customize and adjust their own in-game render distance independently of the server’s global settings. It lets users experience higher or lower render distances than what the server normally allows, providing more control over performance and visuals based on their personal preference and hardware capabilities.
